meta.title: FORGET CAPCUT! Best AI Video Editing Software to Edit YouTube Videos FASTER
meta.description:
Best AI Video editing Software to Edit YouTube Videos FASTER
Try out VEED here: https://bit.ly/danxveed

In this video I show you an AI video editor that can edit your videos fast. The tool is called VEED by @veedstudio. 

With Veed you can remove bad takes, clean up audio, remove silences, and you can use the eye tracking tool to always look into the camera.
Overal this AI video editor is perfect for beginners that want to focus on creating high quality videos.
